velmora-story-image-7a31b9.query:
Quiet, considered jewelry — built to be passed down. Velmora began with a question: why should heirloom-quality jewelry
            only live in vintage shops? Every piece is plated in 18K gold over a
            hypoallergenic core, finished by a small team of jewelers, and made
            in limited runs. No fast trends. No filler. hands of jeweler crafting gold ring atelier warm light editorial
